articles.title: Jaylen Brown opens up about past criticisms of his left hand: ‘There was some truth to it’
articles.description:
"Basketball the game is ruthless, if teams know you have an injury they're going to try to force you to that."

The post Jaylen Brown opens up about past criticisms of his left hand: ‘There was some truth to it’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown acknowledges past criticisms of his left hand affecting his gameplay.
Brown's comments highlight the challenges faced by athletes with injuries in competitive sports.
Boston Celtics fans may see improved performance as Brown addresses his weaknesses.

articles.title: ‘The Red Sox were my dream job’: Don Orsillo reflects on NESN tenure, reunites with former colleagues
articles.description:
“I don’t want to say they did me a favor or anything, because the Red Sox were my dream job.”

summary: Don Orsillo reflects on his 15-year career with NESN covering the Red Sox.

His departure from NESN in 2015 still resonates with local fans and sports culture.

articles.title: Alex Cora explains his decision to slot Roman Anthony at DH early this season
